testcase.classname: employee request and shift screens creates a leave request from a selected shift

testcase.classname: employee request and shift screens creates a yield request with a selected coworker
testcase.name: employee request and shift screens creates a yield request with a selected coworker

testcase.classname: employee request and shift screens claims an open shift from the detail screen
testcase.name: employee request and shift screens claims an open shift from the detail screen

testcase.classname: AppProvider degraded boot boots from cached users when the server is unavailable
testcase.name: AppProvider degraded boot boots from cached users when the server is unavailable

testcase.classname: AppProvider degraded boot falls back to the session shell when the user cache is empty
testcase.name: AppProvider degraded boot falls back to the session shell when the user cache is empty

testcase.classname: SyncStatusBanner snapshot matches the stable sync banner snapshot
testcase.name: SyncStatusBanner snapshot matches the stable sync banner snapshot

testcase.classname: SettingsScreenContent saves a theme change and supports logout
testcase.name: SettingsScreenContent saves a theme change and supports logout

testcase.classname: ApprovalDetailScreen submits an approval action for a pending request
testcase.name: ApprovalDetailScreen submits an approval action for a pending request

testcase.classname: LoginScreen validates empty credentials before login
testcase.name: LoginScreen validates empty credentials before login

testcase.classname: LoginScreen uses a dev seed account and submits login
testcase.name: LoginScreen uses a dev seed account and submits login

testcase.classname: SyncStatusBanner renders offline sync state and triggers a manual sync
testcase.name: SyncStatusBanner renders offline sync state and triggers a manual sync

testcase.classname: AnnouncementCard renders acknowledgement CTA when required and calls the handler
testcase.name: AnnouncementCard renders acknowledgement CTA when required and calls the handler

testcase.classname: date helpers detects overlapping time ranges
testcase.name: date helpers detects overlapping time ranges

testcase.classname: date helpers supports overnight overlap checks across adjacent dates
testcase.name: date helpers supports overnight overlap checks across adjacent dates

testcase.classname: date helpers formats a readable date-time label and adjacent dates
testcase.name: date helpers formats a readable date-time label and adjacent dates

testcase.classname: checkShiftConflict returns true when a candidate overlaps existing shifts
testcase.name: checkShiftConflict returns true when a candidate overlaps existing shifts

testcase.classname: checkShiftConflict detects overnight conflicts on adjacent dates
testcase.name: checkShiftConflict detects overnight conflicts on adjacent dates

testcase.classname: checkShiftConflict ignores the excluded shift id
testcase.name: checkShiftConflict ignores the excluded shift id

testcase.classname: AnnouncementCard snapshot matches the stable card snapshot
testcase.name: AnnouncementCard snapshot matches the stable card snapshot

testcase.classname: sync helpers merges sync snapshot patches
testcase.name: sync helpers merges sync snapshot patches

testcase.classname: sync helpers marks 409 errors as conflict mutations
testcase.name: sync helpers marks 409 errors as conflict mutations

testcase.classname: sync helpers detects likely offline errors and counts pending acknowledgements
testcase.name: sync helpers detects likely offline errors and counts pending acknowledgements

testcase.classname: api client resilience reuses a single refresh flow when multiple requests hit 401 together
testcase.name: api client resilience reuses a single refresh flow when multiple requests hit 401 together

testcase.classname: api client resilience surfaces request timeouts as actionable API errors
testcase.name: api client resilience surfaces request timeouts as actionable API errors

testcase.classname: validation helpers accepts overnight open-shift windows but rejects zero-length windows
testcase.name: validation helpers accepts overnight open-shift windows but rejects zero-length windows

testcase.classname: validation helpers rejects short reasons and missing fields
testcase.name: validation helpers rejects short reasons and missing fields

testcase.classname: sync engine resilience deduplicates overlapping sync cycles
testcase.name: sync engine resilience deduplicates overlapping sync cycles

testcase.classname: sync engine resilience keeps a failed mutation queued and marks the sync snapshot offline
testcase.name: sync engine resilience keeps a failed mutation queued and marks the sync snapshot offline
